goal: Execute the first outer-lane support targets with capture-floor sized launch candidates instead of relying only on score bonuses.
main_idea: Keep the support-first sector factory planner, then add explicit queue candidates sized from capture_floor for the first 1-2 lane targets.
notes: This branch tests whether the planned support queue needs explicit capture-floor launch candidates. It preserves the fixed-pool win count but has not solved the hard loss set yet.
